items.title: VI Live: Feyenoord, Go Ahead Eagles en FC Utrecht vervolgen Europese campagne
items.summary: Welkom in VI Live van donderdag 22 januari. De Europa League gaat na een korte onderbreking weer verder. Feyenoord ontvangt in de eigen Kuip Sturm Graz, FC Utrecht neemt het op tegen RC Genk en Go Ahead reist af naar Frankrijk voor het treffen met OGC Nice.

items.title: Dit moet er gebeuren wil Ajax de tussenronde van de Champions League halen
items.summary: Door de zege op Villarreal heeft Ajax nog altijd een kleine kans om de tussenronde van de Champions League te halen. De Amsterdammers moeten dan zelf hun laatste wedstrijd winnen en hopen op gunstige uitslagen van de concurrentie. In dit artikel lees je wat er moet gebeuren.

items.title: Nederland evenaart twijfelachtig record door verlies PSV
items.summary: Nederland loopt deze Europese cyclus niet bepaald de polonaise. Op de coëfficiëntenranglijst moet klap op klap opgevangen worden. Dat laat zich vangen in een twijfelachtig record dat deze week geëvenaard is.

items.title: Plan Newcastle pakt goed uit tegen 'moeilijk te bespelen' PSV
items.summary: Eddie Howe was zeer te spreken over het optreden van Newcastle United tegen PSV. De manager had in het bijzonder mooie woorden voor spits Yoane Wissa, die woensdagavond zijn eerste goal in de Champions League maakte en Man van de Wedstrijd was.

items.title: Taylor Swift en Bruce Springsteen bezorgen Liverpool financiële mijlpaal
items.summary: Liverpool is voor het eerst de hoogst genoteerde Engelse club in de Football Money League van Deloitte, dat jaarlijks de clubs met de hoogste omzetten op een rijtje zet. Net als vorig jaar leidt Real Madrid de dans.

items.title: Bridget’s View looks to double up at Newcastle
items.summary: We have a busy day’s racing on Thursday with flat action from Newcastle and Southwell, live on Sky Sports Racing...

items.title: McLaren want to simplify Norris-Piastri racing rules in 2026
items.summary: McLaren boss Andrea Stella says the team will attempt to make managing competition between their drivers Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri "simpler" during the 2026 Formula 1 season.

items.title: Djokovic's 399th Grand Slam match win propels him into Australian Open third round
items.summary: Novak Djokovic's 399th Grand Slam match win over Italian qualifier Francesco ​Maestrelli propelled him into the Australian Open third round.

items.title: 'Unique' Rogers looks to prove worth for Villa & England
items.summary: Morgan Rogers says he "can be anything" - while the Aston Villa star is talking about his positional flexibility, rather than boasting about his quality, his confidence is well-placed.

items.title: Szoboszlai: 'I did my homework' on trick free kick
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai said he did his "homework" paid off on his trick free kick that gave Liverpool the lead in a 3-0 win at Marseille in the Champions League on Wednesday.

items.title: Barça win, but injury for Pedri 'not good news'
items.summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said it's "not good news" after losing Pedri to a hamstring injury in Wednesday's 4-2 Champions League win away at Slavia Prague.

items.title: Madrid tops Money League as teams clear $12B
items.summary: Real Madrid topped the latest Deloitte Football Money League rankings, generating a record €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion) in revenue, with the top 20 teams represented clearing €12.4 billion ($14.5 billion) when combined, also a record.

items.title: How to reach the Champions League knockouts: Can Chelsea, Barça avoid the playoff round?
items.summary: We're less than a week away from knowing which 24 teams advance from the league phase. Here's what's at stake with only one matchweek to go.

items.title: If Liverpool want to be successful this season, all roads lead through Szoboszlai
items.summary: Liverpool cruised to a convincing 3-0 victory over Marseille, aided by an excellent performance from Dominik Szoboszlai.

items.title: 'He came here for these nights' - Wissa inspires Newcastle
items.summary: Eddie Howe says Yoane Wissa came to Newcastle "for these nights" after his first Champions League goal at St James' Park.

items.title: Slot praises Salah return on important night for both
items.summary: Arne Slot praises the return of Mohamed Salah, with Liverpool's Champions League win in Marseille proving important for both.

items.title: Liverpool rise up football rich list but Premier League shut out of top four
items.summary: Reds’ success aided by Taylor Swift and Dua Lipa gigs Real Madrid take top spot again with £1.4bn revenue Liverpool were the English club with the highest revenue last season according to the annual Deloitte Football Money League – but for the first time in the report’s 29-year history no Premier League club made the top four. Real Madrid again took top spot with €1.61bn (£1.4bn), far ahead of Barcelona, with €974m. Bayern Munich with €860m and Paris Saint-Germain with €837m were third and fourth respectively. Continue reading...

items.title: Arne Slot praises ‘professional’ Salah after comfortable Liverpool win
items.summary: ‘Salah was fit to play 90 after one day’s training’ Liverpool manager highlights Joe Gomez’s contribution Arne Slot saluted Mohamed Salah’s professionalism and singled out Joe Gomez for praise after Liverpool climbed to fourth in the Champions League table with a commanding win in Marseille. Liverpool, who host Qarabag at Anfield next week in their final group game, delivered a fine performance and result against Roberto De ­Zerbi’s team to record a ninth win in 11 ­European away fixtures. Continue reading...

items.title: Who can join Arsenal & Bayern in Champions League knockouts?
items.summary: With the league phase of Champions League almost at its conclusion, which teams can join Arsenal and Bayern Munich in the top eight?
